name: standard
author: ark2398
description: This profile is designed to simulate the sensations of being punished.

sensations.name: stroke
sensations.description: A gentle, rhythmic tingling that feels like a light stroking across the skin.

sensations.name: shock
sensations.description: A short, sharp pinch, similar to a light needle prick.

sensations.name: pulse
sensations.description: A deep, throbbing sensation that mimics a heartbeat and spreads broadly.

sensations.name: cramp
sensations.description: An intense contraction of the muscles, exerting a distinct but still manageable pressure.
